## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7) {#trm1.4.-vertical-flight-efficiency-of-the-descent-pi7 .Heading-2-TZ}

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are 95.8 seconds per flight lower in Sweden. Stockholm Arlanda Airport (ESSA) has an average time flown level of 53.4 seconds per flight during descent.
